cases.description: Explicit request to create a new agent triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a new agent that reviews pull requests for security issues
expectations: Interviews user for role, triggers, output, tools, model before scaffolding
Proposes or runs `codi add agent <name>` to scaffold
Writes frontmatter with kebab-case name, description, version, tools, model, managed_by
Description contains pushy trigger keywords (Use when / Also activate)
Defines confidence filtering and severity matrix

cases.description: User phrasing with 'subagent' still triggers the skill
cases.prompt: scaffold a subagent for analyzing database migrations
expectations: Asks for the 5 intent questions before writing any file
Proposes a frontmatter with minimal tool surface

cases.description: Named role request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I want to add a code reviewer agent for our TypeScript repo

cases.description: Editing an existing agent without create intent does NOT trigger
cases.prompt: change the model of the code-reviewer agent from sonnet to opus
expectations: Edits the existing agent file directly or explains how

cases.description: Unrelated query does not trigger the skill
expectations: Does NOT create any agent file
